title: Tidy-Up Time
lesson: Putting your toys away keeps your room tidy and happy.
prompts: Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image into a cozy child's bedroom with toys scattered everywhere, building blocks, a teddy bear and picture books spread across the floor. Medium shot at eye level, the person standing in the messy room facing the camera with their face fully visible. Warm lamplight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A scene in the same messy bedroom. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left in the mid-ground, facing the camera with their face clearly visible and an unsure expression, looking at the toys on the floor. In the right foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels beside a colourful toy box and gestures gently toward the scattered toys, suggesting it is time to tidy up. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is alone in the cozy bedroom, kneeling on the floor to pick up building blocks but with the head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, a small determined smile on their face. Toys still scattered around them, a colourful toy box nearby. Eye-level medium shot, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A scene in the same bedroom, now half-tidied. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is on the far left, kneeling but with the head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, dropping a teddy bear into a colourful toy box. To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels and places picture books onto a low shelf, smiling encouragingly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Transform the scene: the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands alone in a now neat and tidy bedroom, all the toys put away, the floor clear, the toy box closed and the books lined up on the shelf. The person faces the camera at eye level with their face fully visible, looking around the clean bright room with a happy expression. Cheerful morning light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A warm scene in the tidy, bright bedroom. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a proud, beaming smile, hands on hips. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} stands beside them clapping happily and looking proud. The clean room glows with warm sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
texts: Uh oh — your room was a big mess! Toys, books and blocks lay all over the floor.
"It's tidy-up time," said Mum, pointing to the toy box with a gentle smile.
You started picking up the blocks, one by one. "I can do this!" you said.
You popped your teddy in the box while Mum lined up the books. You worked together as a team.
Soon every toy was put away. Your room was neat and bright! You looked around, so happy.
"You did it!" Mum cheered, clapping. You stood tall and proud. A tidy room is a happy room.
